generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for environmental data capture"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth data capture"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller providing vehicle speed and steering feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESC
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESC
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from DBSCAN and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between Physical and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for implementing data processing algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for model implementation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring and reporting for developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution in Digital Twin for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web-based UI for remote ACC control management"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC-derived desired speed for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of ACC parameters via web UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlling vehicle steering angles"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "On-vehicle ROS2 nodes environment for Physical Twin"
    base:contains VehicleControlNode, SensorFusionNode, CommunicationNode
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud-based Digital Twin Entity"
    base:contains DataProcessingNode, ACCControlNode, VisualizationNode
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Web-based User Entity"
    base:contains WebUIComponent
]

instance VehicleControlNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for vehicle speed and steering control"
]

instance SensorFusionNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for sensor data fusion"
]

instance CommunicationNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for communication between PT and DT"
]

instance DataProcessingNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for DBSCAN and Kalman filtering"
]

instance ACCControlNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for ACC control logic"
]

instance VisualizationNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for 3D visualization"
]

instance WebUIComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Web-based UI for remote management and visualization"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable commands) from the DT to the PT's motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via ROS2 intra-vehicle communication and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication with Data Translation FE handling data serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during development (troubleshooting) and operation phases, covering 'as operated' representation of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialization handled by Data Translation FE; end-to-end latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted in cloud."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; ROS2 middleware standard."
]
